components.name: Typewriter
components.description: Reveals text one character at a time, like live typing (typewriter / typing / terminal-typing effect). Can sync to spoken-word timestamps to type in time with narration. Use for intros, code/terminal vibes, or building suspense word by word.

text.label: Text
text.description: The text to type out (supports line breaks)

speed.label: Speed
speed.description: Finish multiplier: 1 = finishes at scene end, higher = finishes earlier (always completes)

wordTimestamps.label: Word Timestamps
wordTimestamps.description: Array of word timing objects for karaoke sync

components.name: TextReveal
components.description: Reveals text word by word with a fade, blur, or slide-up per word (staggered word reveal / kinetic text). Smoother and more elegant than character typing. Use for narrated captions, quotes, or building a phrase progressively.

text.label: Text
text.description: The text to reveal (supports line breaks)

wordTimestamps.label: Word Timestamps
wordTimestamps.description: Array of word timing objects for karaoke sync

components.name: StyleTextBlock
components.description: General-purpose text block — the default for any title, paragraph, caption or quote when no special effect is needed. Variants: heading, body, caption, quote. Use this for clean, legible on-screen text (plain title / subtitle / body copy).

fontSize.label: Font Size
fontSize.description: Text size (px). Bigger = fewer words per line

maxLines.label: Max Lines
maxLines.description: Maximum number of lines before truncation

truncate.label: Truncate
truncate.description: Con Max Lines: true recorta con "…"; false deja fluir/envolver

wordTimestamps.label: Word Timestamps
wordTimestamps.description: Array of word timing objects for karaoke sync

components.name: StyleTextHighlight
components.description: Text where each word gets a colored background pill that fills in sequentially (word highlight / text reveal / sequential highlight / marker text). Use for emphasis and progressive text reveal.

fontSize.label: Font Size
fontSize.description: Font size in px (auto if empty)

paddingX.label: Padding X
paddingX.description: Horizontal padding per word (auto if empty)

paddingY.label: Padding Y
paddingY.description: Vertical padding per word (auto if empty)

components.name: StyleScrambleText
components.description: Text that scrambles and decodes into place, with characters flickering through random symbols before settling (hacker / Matrix / decrypt / glitch-decode effect). Use for tech, hacking or reveal-the-answer moments.

text.label: Text
text.description: The text to scramble/decode (supports line breaks)

loop.label: Loop
loop.description: Whether to loop the scramble effect

wordTimestamps.label: Word Timestamps
wordTimestamps.description: Array of word timing objects for karaoke sync

components.name: StyleSoundWave
components.description: Sound wave visualization with two variants: continuous sine wave (line) or equalizer bars (bars). Use for audio visualization, music mood, or tech ambiance.

variant.label: Variant
variant.description: Visual style: line (sine wave) or bars (equalizer)

width.label: Width
width.description: Component width in px (auto if empty)

points.label: Points
points.description: Number of points for line variant

direction.label: Direction
direction.description: Wave travel direction for line variant

barCount.label: Bar Count
barCount.description: Number of bars for bars variant

maxBarHeight.label: Max Bar Height
maxBarHeight.description: Maximum bar height for bars variant (auto if empty)

gap.label: Gap
gap.description: Gap between bars for bars variant (auto if empty)

components.name: StyleStarfield
components.description: Starfield/space effect with configurable star count, movement patterns (radial/random/directional), colors, and area dimensions (stars / space / warp speed / particle field). Use for space backgrounds, tech ambiance, or motion effects.

colorVariation.label: Color Variation
colorVariation.description: Add slight hue variation per star

components.name: StyleStatCard
components.description: KPI stat card with animated counter, label, and optional sub-stats row (big number card / metric card / stat badge). Use for showcasing a single key metric with context.

components.name: WordHighlight
components.description: Karaoke-style subtitles: shows the caption and highlights the spoken word, synced to audio when available (word-by-word highlight / bouncing-ball subtitle / lyric caption). Without timestamps it sweeps word by word over time (works in preview). Use for talking-head captions and lyric videos.

speed.label: Speed
speed.description: Words/sec when there are no audio timestamps

activeScale.label: Active Scale
activeScale.description: Scale factor for the active word (1 = no pop)

wordTimestamps.label: Word Timestamps
wordTimestamps.description: Array of word timing objects for karaoke sync

components.name: SplitText
components.description: Two short words that slide apart (vertically or horizontally) to reveal a word behind them (split-open / cinematic title reveal). Use for dramatic title intros and big reveals.

splitAmount.label: Split Amount
splitAmount.description: How far the halves separate (× font size)

components.name: TextSwap
components.description: Swaps one word for another with a roll/slide/3D-flip (text swap / word flip / before-after). Use for "X becomes Y" transformations, before/after, or punchlines.

components.name: GlitchTitle
components.description: Title with a digital glitch: RGB channel split, jitter and clip-path tears (glitch / distortion / cyberpunk / datamosh title). Use for edgy, tech, gaming, or error/alert vibes.

components.name: GradientText
components.description: Text filled with an animated shimmering color gradient that flows across the letters (gradient / holographic / iridescent headline). Modern and eye-catching. Use for hero titles and brand words.

width.label: Max Width
width.description: Max width before wrapping (px). Empty = auto

components.name: StrikethroughText
components.description: Text with a line that animates through it, crossing it out after it appears (strikethrough / cross-out / "not this" effect). Crosses ALL lines when multi-line. Use to negate or correct.

text.label: Text
text.description: The text to strikethrough (supports line breaks)

components.name: UnderlineReveal
components.description: Text with an underline that draws in from left to right beneath it (animated / pen-stroke underline). Each line gets its own underline when multi-line. Use to emphasize a key word or term.

text.label: Text
text.description: The text to underline (supports line breaks)

components.name: HighlightText
components.description: Text with a marker/highlighter swipe that sweeps a colored band across it (highlight / marker pen / emphasis). Highlights ALL lines when multi-line. Use to spotlight the most important words.

text.label: Text
text.description: The text to highlight (supports line breaks)

color.label: Text Color
color.description: Text color (dark reads well over the marker)

components.name: IconifyIcon
components.description: Renders any icon from the Iconify library by name (e.g. "mdi:heart") — 200k+ icons, logos and symbols (icon / pictogram / glyph / logo). The default way to show a single icon; supports entry/exit and continuous animation (bounce/pulse/spin/float/shake). For an icon that reacts to a spoken word use KeywordPop.

components.name: KeywordPop
components.description: An icon that pops onto the screen exactly when a specific word is spoken, synced to the audio timestamps (word-triggered icon / keyword highlight / pop-on-cue). Use to punctuate narration with a visual at the right moment.

triggerWord.label: Trigger Word
triggerWord.description: Word that triggers the icon appearance

glow.label: Glow
glow.description: Halo/glow radius behind the icon (0 = off)

wordTimestamps.label: Word Timestamps
wordTimestamps.description: Array of word timing objects for sync

components.name: KineticBackground
components.description: Full-screen animated gradient background with slowly shifting, morphing colors (gradient backdrop / aurora / mesh-gradient / ambient color wash). The default lively background behind any content. Use when you want motion without distracting shapes.

components.name: ParticleField
components.description: Field of small floating particles drifting across the screen (particles / dust / sparkles / floating dots / confetti-like specks). Atomic: color, transparent background by default, density, speed, size + glow, flow direction. Confinable to a region via Universal x/y (center) + width/height. Use for ambiance, magic/tech mood, or subtle motion behind text.

components.name: StyleParticleExplosion
components.description: Burst of particles that explode outward from center with spring physics, rotation, and fade out (particle explosion / burst / confetti burst / firework / impact effect). Use for reveals, celebrations, or impact moments.

textFontSize.label: Text Font Size
textFontSize.description: Text font size in px (auto if empty)

particleSize.label: Particle Size
particleSize.description: Particle diameter in px (auto if empty)

maxDistance.label: Max Distance
maxDistance.description: Max distance particles travel (auto if empty)

components.name: StylePixelTransition
components.description: Background effect where pixels appear randomly with different colors, creating a pixelated transition/fill (pixel transition / pixel fill / mosaic reveal / digital noise). Use for tech backgrounds, transitions, or digital mood.

pixelSize.label: Pixel Size
pixelSize.description: Size of each pixel in px

width.label: Width
width.description: Grid area width in px (default: full canvas)

height.label: Height
height.description: Grid area height in px (default: full canvas)

maxDelay.label: Max Delay
maxDelay.description: Max frames before a pixel appears

components.name: FloatingBlobs
components.description: Soft, blurry, drifting color glows (ambient gradient orbs / bokeh-like backdrop). NOT hard shapes. Confinable to a region with Universal x/y (center) + width/height, so it can fill only half the screen, move up, stretch or shrink; blobs distribute inside that box. Up to 20 blobs; smaller blobSize + higher count = many small glows with space between them. Opacity via Universal Props.

color3.label: Color 3
color3.description: Third glow color (colors cycle per blob)

components.name: RaysOfLight
components.description: Rotating light rays beaming out from a point (god rays / sunburst / radial beams / starburst / light rays). Atomic: ray color, transparent background by default, ray count, thickness, opacity, spin speed and fade. Positionable origin via x/y; rays span the diagonal so they cover corners in any aspect (incl. vertical 9:16). Use for divine/hero reveals or an energetic radial backdrop.

fade.label: Fade
fade.description: Where rays fade out from the origin (% radius)

components.name: AbstractWave
components.description: Smooth overlapping sine waves (flowing wavy lines / audio-like ribbons) with glow. Decorative accent, positionable with x/y + width/height. Fully tunable: number of waves, color, amplitude, frequency, travel speed/direction and vertical separation.

frequency.label: Frequency
frequency.description: Number of crests across the width

components.name: KenBurns
components.description: Ken Burns effect: slow cinematic ZOOM and PAN over a photo/image (documentary camera move / slow zoom / image pan). This is camera motion over an IMAGE, NOT a gradient — when no image url is given it falls back to a moving gradient plate just so the scene is not empty. Use to bring still photos to life in visual scenes.

url.label: Image URL
url.description: Background image to pan/zoom. Leave empty for gradient.

overlay.label: Overlay
overlay.description: Dark overlay opacity for text legibility (0-1)

components.name: CinematicBars
components.description: Letterbox / cinematic black bars (top + bottom) for a 2.39:1 film look. Full-screen overlay; pairs with KenBurns for visual scenes. Its own slide-in can be turned off (animate=false) so the layer entry/exit (fade-in/out) controls it instead. Note: it only DRAWS the bars — it does not reflow content into the visible band.

size.label: Bar Size
size.description: Bar height as % of canvas (per bar)

animate.label: Animate
animate.description: Slide bars in (turn off to use layer fade-in/out)

components.name: Spotlight
components.description: Theatrical spotlight: lights a point and darkens the rest to focus attention (spotlight / vignette / focus / iris). Positionable via x/y (absolute center); radius controls how much is lit (small = only part of the screen). Optional iris-in entrance (the light opens up) and subtle breathing. Full-screen overlay, cinematic.

radius.label: Radius
radius.description: Spotlight size (% of canvas; small = lights only part)

irisIn.label: Iris In
irisIn.description: Open the spotlight from closed on entry

components.name: CameraShake
components.description: Scene-wide handheld camera shake (affects the WHOLE scene). Use for impact/energy moments. It draws nothing by itself. To shake only SOME layers together (e.g. a title + a wave), put them in a group layer and set the group's "cameraShake" instead of adding this component.

components.name: GlobalVFX
components.description: Old analog TV with NO SIGNAL overlay: animated static / snow (white-noise grain), CRT scanlines, screen flicker and vignette. Dead-channel / VHS / retro glitch look. Full-screen overlay (does not reposition).

tint.label: Tint
tint.description: Optional static color tint (e.g. bluish dead channel)

components.name: NetworkNodes
components.description: Ambient "neural network" / constellation: dots that drift and connect by proximity (network / nodes / plexus / connections / tech mesh). Positions are random-but-deterministic (change "seed" for a new layout). Confinable to a region via Universal x/y (center) + width/height. Good behind text or as a visual-only backdrop.

lineColor.label: Line Color
lineColor.description: Color of the connections (defaults to node color)

connectionDistance.label: Connection Distance
connectionDistance.description: Distance (px) under which nodes connect. Empty = auto.

seed.label: Seed
seed.description: Layout seed (change for a different arrangement)

components.name: GradientOverlay
components.description: Gradient layer placed ON TOP of content to darken/tint it (scrim / vignette gradient / color wash / readability overlay). Linear or radial, up to 3 colors with an adjustable mid-point (to make the middle color weigh more/less), angle (linear) or center+size (radial, which also positions it). Accepts rgba()/transparent. Use to improve text legibility or to tint a scene.

type.label: Type
type.description: Linear (directional) or radial (round, from a point)

midPoint.label: Mid Point
midPoint.description: Position % of the middle color (when 3 colors)

components.name: GridPerspective
components.description: Retro perspective floor grid scrolling toward the horizon (synthwave / retrowave / outrun / Tron / 80s neon grid). Atomic: line color, transparent background by default, line density (cellSize) & width, movement direction (forward/backward/left/right), perspective angle & depth. Use for retro, gaming, music or tech-nostalgia backdrops.

cellSize.label: Cell Size
cellSize.description: Spacing between lines (px). Smaller = more lines

components.name: StyleBadge
components.description: Small status badge/pill with semantic color presets — success, warning, error, info, neutral — and an optional icon (badge / status / label / pill). Colors, font and shape are fully overridable. Use for statuses and small labels. For keyword/filter tags use StyleChip; for a big decorative floating sticker use FloatingBadge.

fontSize.label: Font Size
fontSize.description: Font size in px (auto if empty)

width.label: Max Width
width.description: Max width in px (>0 wraps lines)

animateIn.label: Animate In
animateIn.description: Built-in bounce entry (off = use layer entry/exit)

components.name: StyleButton
components.description: A button with primary/secondary/ghost/outline presets and an optional icon (button / CTA / action). Colors, font and width/height fully overridable. Use for calls-to-action and UI mockups.

fontSize.label: Font Size
fontSize.description: Font size in px (auto if empty)

width.label: Width
width.description: Fixed width in px (auto if empty)

height.label: Height
height.description: Fixed height in px (auto if empty)

animateIn.label: Animate In
animateIn.description: Built-in pop entry (off = use layer entry/exit)

components.name: StyleCard
components.description: Generic card container/panel with elevated, filled, outlined or glass (frosted) presets (card / panel / tile / surface). Title + subtitle wrap long text. Colors, fonts, border and shadow fully overridable. Use to group content onto a contained surface.

width.label: Width
width.description: Card width in px (auto if empty)

height.label: Height
height.description: Card height in px (auto if empty)

titleSize.label: Title Size
titleSize.description: Title size in px (auto if empty)

subtitleSize.label: Subtitle Size
subtitleSize.description: Subtitle size in px (auto if empty)

animateIn.label: Animate In
animateIn.description: Built-in slide-up entry (off = use layer entry/exit)

components.name: StyleCardFlip
components.description: 3D card flip animation with configurable front and back content (card flip / 3D flip / reveal card / flip animation). Use for reveals, comparisons, or before/after showcases.

cardWidth.label: Card Width
cardWidth.description: Card width in px (auto if empty)

cardHeight.label: Card Height
cardHeight.description: Card height in px (auto if empty)

fontSize.label: Font Size
fontSize.description: Font size in px (auto if empty)

components.name: StyleChip
components.description: Chip/tag for keywords, categories or filters, with filled/outlined/soft presets and an optional delete (×) (chip / tag / pill / hashtag / label). Colors, font and shape overridable. Use for tag lists and filters. For a status indicator use StyleBadge.

fontSize.label: Font Size
fontSize.description: Font size in px (auto if empty)

width.label: Max Width
width.description: Max width in px (>0 wraps lines)

animateIn.label: Animate In
animateIn.description: Built-in pop entry (off = use layer entry/exit)

components.name: StyleComparisonChart
components.description: Before/after comparison chart with two animated bars, values, and divider (A/B test / before vs after / performance comparison). Use for showing improvement or comparison between two states.

barWidth.label: Bar Width
barWidth.description: Bar width in px (auto if empty)

components.name: StyleCountdown
components.description: Cinematic countdown with a sequence of labels (e.g. 5-4-3-2-1-GO), each with spring entrance and fade (countdown timer / launch sequence / get ready). Use for intros and launches.

framesPerLabel.label: Frames Per Label
framesPerLabel.description: Frames each label stays on screen

fontSize.label: Font Size
fontSize.description: Font size for regular labels (auto if empty)

finalFontSize.label: Final Font Size
finalFontSize.description: Font size for the last label (auto if empty)

components.name: StyleDivider
components.description: Divider/separator line, horizontal or vertical, in solid/dashed/dotted/gradient styles (divider / separator / rule / line break). Editable color, thickness and length. Use to split sections of content.

animateIn.label: Animate In
animateIn.description: Built-in grow entry (off = use layer entry/exit)

components.name: StyleDonutChart
components.description: KPI donut chart with animated ring segments, background track, and animated center counter (completion rate / progress donut). Use for showing completion metrics and multi-part progress.

centerValue.label: Center Value
centerValue.description: Target number for center counter (auto if empty)

components.name: StyleAvatar
components.description: Profile avatar with icon, name, subtitle, an animated ring and optional badge (avatar / profile pic / user chip / account). Variants: solid, ring (rotating dashed ring), gradient (gradient ring). Use to represent a person or account.

ringWidth.label: Ring Width
ringWidth.description: Ring/border thickness in px (auto if empty)

components.name: StyleTicker
components.description: Horizontal scrolling ticker tape that loops seamlessly (stock ticker / news crawl / marquee / running headlines). Separator char divides items; editable colors, size, direction and loop. Use for finance tickers or news-style scrolling text along a bar.

loop.label: Loop
loop.description: Endless loop (off = scroll once and stop)

components.name: StyleAnimateNumber
components.description: Number that animates/counts from a start value to a target, with an optional caption below (animated number / count-up / rolling stat). For a big standalone stat use CounterNumber, for social follows use FollowerCounter.

captionSize.label: Caption Size
captionSize.description: Caption size in px (auto if empty)

components.name: StyleWatermark
components.description: Subtle, semi-transparent watermark (logo or icon) anchored to a corner or center (watermark / branding stamp / @handle overlay / signature). Use a position preset (anchors to the edge with a margin) OR set x/y for a free position. Use to brand a video persistently without distracting.

margin.label: Margin
margin.description: Distance from edge for corner positions (px)

monochrome.label: Monochrome
monochrome.description: Force image to black & white (image only)

components.name: StyleFakeScroll
components.description: Auto-scrolling list/feed that scrolls by itself, with optional scrollbar (fake scroll / auto-scroll list / feed scroll). Editable colors, sizes and spacing. Use to mimic browsing a social feed, chat or webpage.

itemHeight.label: Item Height
itemHeight.description: Height per item px (auto if empty)

components.name: StyleMultiBar
components.description: Card with multiple animated progress bars, each with label and percentage counter (skills overview / comparison bars / multi-metric). Use for showing multiple metrics or skill levels at once.

barHeight.label: Bar Height
barHeight.description: Bar height in px (auto if empty)

components.name: StyleCursor
components.description: Mouse cursor that travels through a path of points and clicks with a ripple at each stop (cursor / pointer / click-through / demo cursor / mouse / single or multi-click). For a single move-and-click, give it two points (start, then the click point). Use for product walkthroughs and click demos.

points.label: Points
points.description: Path: {x, y, click, holdFrames}. Two points = one move + click.

components.name: StyleCallout
components.description: Annotation that points at something — arrow, dashed circle, or highlight box (callout / annotation / pointer / "look here" marker). Editable color, text color, size and font. Use to draw attention to a specific part of the screen.

bgColor.label: Highlight Fill
bgColor.description: Box fill for highlight variant (empty = accent tint)

fontSize.label: Font Size
fontSize.description: Text size in px (auto if empty)

width.label: Max Width
width.description: Max text width in px (>0 wraps)

components.name: StyleVideoPlayer
components.description: Embeds a real video inside a rounded frame, with optional time trim (start/end), any size and editable border (video player / media player / clip / video frame). Use to show a video clip inside the composition.

trimEnd.label: Trim End (s)
trimEnd.description: Fragment end in seconds (0 = to end)

borderWidth.label: Border Width
borderWidth.description: Frame border thickness px (auto if empty)

animateIn.label: Animate In
animateIn.description: Built-in pop entry (off = use layer entry/exit)

components.name: StyleSimulatedHover
components.description: A self-contained button/card/link that fakes a mouse-hover state — it lifts/scales/shadows as if hovered (hover effect / mouseover / interactive cue / clickable hint). It renders its OWN element; it does not wrap other components. Use to hint that something is clickable in UI walkthroughs.

animateIn.label: Animate In
animateIn.description: Built-in pop entry (off = use layer entry/exit)

components.name: StyleBarChart
components.description: Standard bar chart, vertical or horizontal, with animated bars (bar graph / column chart). The general-purpose bar chart for comparing categories or values. For an emphatic spring entrance use BarChartReveal.

components.name: StylePieChart
components.description: Pie or donut chart with an animated slice reveal and legend (pie / donut / circle chart). Use for parts-of-a-whole and percentage breakdowns. For a clock-style sweep entrance use PieChartReveal.

explodeSlice.label: Explode Slice
explodeSlice.description: Index of slice to explode outward (-1 = none)

components.name: StylePulseText
components.description: Text where each character pulses (scales up/down) in a wave pattern with a glow effect behind each letter (pulsing text / wave text / glowing letters). Use for emphasis and attention-grabbing text.

fontSize.label: Font Size
fontSize.description: Font size in px (auto if empty)

components.name: StyleProgressSteps
components.description: Animated progress timeline with sequential step fill, connecting lines, and configurable direction (progress steps / timeline / roadmap / workflow / process steps). Use for showing project phases or multi-step processes.

steps.label: Steps
steps.description: Array of step labels or {label, color} objects

circleSize.label: Circle Size
circleSize.description: Circle diameter in px (auto if empty)

lineLength.label: Line Length
lineLength.description: Distance between circles in px (auto if empty)

components.name: StyleSpringText
components.description: Text where each character springs in with opacity, Y offset, and rotation (spring text / bounce text / character entrance). Use for dynamic text entrances with physics-based motion.

fontSize.label: Font Size
fontSize.description: Font size in px (auto if empty)

maxRotation.label: Max Rotation
maxRotation.description: Rotation degrees during entrance (0 = no rotation)

components.name: StyleLineChart
components.description: Line chart that draws itself across the screen, with optional area fill, dots, grid and title (line graph / trend chart / time series). Glassmorphic card with gradient line and glow. Use for trends and growth over time.

showAxisLines.label: Show Axis Lines
showAxisLines.description: Display X and Y axis lines

yAxisValues.label: Y-Axis Values
yAxisValues.description: Values to show on Y axis

components.name: StyleFunnelChart
components.description: Funnel chart of conversion stages labeled with percentages (sales funnel / conversion funnel / drop-off chart). Use for marketing funnels and step-by-step conversion. For a bolder trapezoid-shape version use FunnelChart.

data.label: Data
data.description: Array of {label, value, color} funnel stages

components.name: StyleRadarChart
components.description: Radar/spider chart plotting several metrics on axes radiating from a center (spider / web / star / polar chart). Use to compare strengths or attributes across categories. For a polygon/circular-grid variant see RadarSpiderChart.

components.name: StyleRotatingCarousel
components.description: 3D rotating carousel where all cards are visible simultaneously, rotating in a circular path with depth simulation (rotating cards / 3D carousel / feature showcase). Use for showcasing multiple features or items in a dynamic rotation.

cards.label: Cards
cards.description: Array of card labels or {label, icon, color} objects

radius.label: Carousel Radius
radius.description: Carousel radius in px (auto if empty)

cardWidth.label: Card Width
cardWidth.description: Card width in px (auto if empty)

cardHeight.label: Card Height
cardHeight.description: Card height in px (auto if empty)

components.name: StyleBarRace
components.description: Animated bar-chart race: horizontal bars sorted by value that grow and overtake each other over time (bar chart race / racing bars). Use for "who is winning over time" rankings that change. For a one-shot ranking that just grows in, use HorizontalBarRace.

components.name: BarChartReveal
components.description: Bar/column chart whose bars pop in with a staggered spring (animated bar reveal). Per-bar colors, value labels on top, x-axis labels, optional title/subtitle. Pick this when the reveal animation is the point; for a plain configurable bar chart use StyleBarChart.

data.label: Data
data.description: Values 0-100, or {value, label, color} per bar

colors.label: Bar Colors
colors.description: Per-bar colors (or use data[].color); empty = gradient

showValues.label: Show Values
showValues.description: Value on top of each bar

barRadius.label: Bar Radius
barRadius.description: Bar corner radius px (auto if empty)

gap.label: Gap
gap.description: Gap between bars px (auto if empty)

components.name: PieChartReveal
components.description: Donut chart whose ring sweeps in like a clock to reveal the slices, with legend (animated donut reveal). Pick this when the sweep-in animation matters; for a plain pie/donut use StylePieChart.

components.name: FunnelChart
components.description: Funnel built from bold stacked trapezoid stages that spring in (conversion funnel / sales funnel / pipeline). Shape-driven and dramatic; for a version with percentage labels per stage use StyleFunnelChart.

components.name: HorizontalBarRace
components.description: Static ranking of horizontal bars (sorted by value) that grow in once with a staggered spring; each item can have an icon (leaderboard / top-N ranking / horizontal bar chart). Good for "top N" comparisons. For bars that change value and overtake over time, use StyleBarRace.

components.name: RadarSpiderChart
components.description: Radar/spider chart with animated data polygon and dots at each axis. Grid can be polygon or circular.

components.name: PercentageRing
components.description: Circular progress ring that fills to a percentage with the number in the center (radial progress / completion ring / gauge / donut progress). Use for a single-stat completion, score, or KPI.

components.name: CounterNumber
components.description: Large number that counts up/animates to a target value, with optional prefix and suffix (animated counter / number ticker / odometer / roll-up stat). Use for big stats, metrics, money amounts, views or downloads.

components.name: ScoreboardCounter
components.description: Two-team scoreboard with animated scores and colored team headers (sports scoreboard / vs score / match result / head-to-head). Use for sports, competitions or any A-vs-B tally.

components.name: FollowerCounter
components.description: Social follower count that ticks up, with a platform icon (subscriber counter / follower count / gaining followers / 1M subs). Use for growth and milestone moments on a social platform.

components.name: TrendLine
components.description: Single glowing trend line that draws across data points, no axes (sparkline / trend / stock line / going up-right). Minimal; use for a quick "trending up/down" visual or a hero growth line.

components.name: StockCandlestick
components.description: Stock candlestick chart with OHLC candles appearing in sequence (trading / finance / crypto / market / price-action chart). Use for finance, trading, crypto and market price moves.

components.name: TikTokOverlay
components.description: TikTok-style UI overlay with the side action buttons — likes, comments, shares — and the spinning sound disc (TikTok / Reels / Shorts vertical-video UI). Use to mock a short-form video screen or fake a viral clip.

components.name: InstagramPost
components.description: Instagram post mockup: profile header, image area, like/comment row and caption (IG post / social card / feed post). Use to fake a social-media post or show a brand on Instagram.

components.name: TweetCard
components.description: Twitter/X tweet card: avatar, name, @handle, tweet text and engagement stats (tweet / X post / quote tweet / social card). Use to show a tweet, a quote, or a reaction on X.

components.name: YouTubeEndScreen
components.description: YouTube end screen / outro card with video thumbnail slots, a subscribe button and title (end card / outro / "watch next" screen). Use for the closing call-to-action of a YouTube-style video.

components.name: SubscribeButton
components.description: Subscribe/follow button that gets clicked and changes state (subscribe / follow / CTA button / "hit the bell"). Use for call-to-action moments urging viewers to subscribe or follow.

components.name: AppStoreButtons
components.description: App Store and Google Play download badges/buttons appearing with a staggered entrance ("download on the App Store" / "get it on Google Play" / app download CTA). Use to promote a mobile app.

components.name: ShoppingCartBadge
components.description: Shopping cart (or bag) icon with a count badge that pops in (add-to-cart / cart count / e-commerce notification). Use for shopping, checkout, or "item added" moments.

components.name: SizeSelector
components.description: Clothing size selector (XS, S, M, L, XL) with an animated highlight landing on the chosen size (size picker / size options / fashion e-commerce). Use for apparel/product demos when picking a size.

components.name: SocialProgressBar
components.description: Instagram/TikTok-style story progress bar(s) at the top that fill over the video duration (story bar / stories progress / segmented timeline). Use to mimic a Stories/Reels viewing experience.

components.name: SocialSharePopup
components.description: Share sheet / popup drawer sliding up with social app icons (WhatsApp, Twitter, Email) (share menu / share sheet / send-to). Use for "share this" call-to-action moments.

components.name: BrowserWindow
components.description: Browser window mockup with an address bar and a chrome style (mac dots / windows buttons / minimal). Editable interior: icon + title + subtitle + colors.

icon.label: Icon
icon.description: Optional icon shown above the title

components.name: PhoneMockup
components.description: Phone/device mockup that slides up, with editable interior (icon + title + subtitle + screen color). Models: iphone (dynamic island), android (punch-hole), tablet (no notch), custom (your width/height). Editable bezel, corners, shadow and notch.

icon.label: Icon
icon.description: Optional icon shown above the title

accentColor.label: Icon Color
accentColor.description: Color of the interior icon (only visible if an icon is set)

bezelWidth.label: Bezel Width
bezelWidth.description: Frame thickness in px (auto if empty)

cornerRadius.label: Corner Radius
cornerRadius.description: Corner radius in px (auto if empty)

components.name: AnimatedChecklist
components.description: Animated list that reveals items one by one, each with a check/icon. Styles: card (boxed rows), minimal (plain), numbered (1·2·3 badges). Ideal for "3 reasons", "steps", "tips". The icon is a per-row accent, not the hero.

components.name: RotatingCarousel
components.description: Auto-advancing carousel of items, each with an icon and/or label (and optional per-slide color). Use to show several facets of a concept (e.g. coffee → espresso/latte/cappuccino) instead of a single big icon. Dots can sit inside/outside/none; transition can be slide/fade/scale. The icon is an accent per slide, not the centered hero.

items.label: Items
items.description: Slides: {icon, label, color} (color tints that slide)

width.label: Width
width.description: Card width in px (auto if empty)

components.name: LogoReveal
components.description: Brand intro: animated reveal of a logo image (url) and/or brand name + tagline, with a shine sweep. Supports logo image, text, or both.

url.label: Logo URL
url.description: Logo image. Leave empty for text-only brand.

components.name: BrandOutro
components.description: Closing brand card for the last scene: logo + brand + handle + CTA. Supports logo image, text, or both.

components.name: MediaFrame
components.description: A framed container for an image or media, with configurable border, shadow and object-fit (photo frame / image frame / picture border). Shapes: rounded/rect/circle/triangle. Free position via x/y + width/height, or fullScreen to cover the whole canvas. Use to present an image; for a slow zoom over a photo use KenBurns.

components.name: SplitScreenGrid
components.description: Split-screen grid of panels that animate into place (split screen / multi-cam / quad view / comparison grid / mosaic). Any number of panels and columns (2, 3, 4…), each with its own color, text, icon and shape. Entry: split (from center), scale, fade or slide; stagger to reveal them one by one. Use to compare or show several things at once.

panels.label: Panels
panels.description: Panels: {color, text, icon, textColor, shape, span}

stagger.label: Stagger
stagger.description: Frames between panels (0 = all at once)

cornerRadius.label: Corner Radius
cornerRadius.description: Panel corner radius in px (auto if empty)

cover.label: Full Screen
cover.description: Cover whole canvas (off = sized box at x/y)

width.label: Width
width.description: Box width when not full screen (px)

height.label: Height
height.description: Box height when not full screen (px)

components.name: QuoteBlock
components.description: Styled pull-quote block with a big decorative quotation mark and author attribution (quote / blockquote / pull quote / citation). Use for memorable quotes or testimonials as styled text.

text.label: Quote Text
text.default: The future belongs to those who build it.

components.name: LowerThird
components.description: Broadcast lower-third: a name/title graphic with an accent bar that slides in near the bottom (lower third / name tag / chyron / news caption / speaker label). Use to introduce a person or topic on screen.

components.name: CountdownTimer
components.description: Countdown timer with a progress ring that pops on each second (countdown / timer / 3-2-1 / get ready / starting soon). Use for intros and launches. For sale urgency use FlashSaleTimer.

components.name: LoadingSpinner
components.description: Circular loading spinner that rotates (spinner / loader / loading / buffering / please wait). Use for loading or processing moments. Pair its exit with another component's entryDelay to show "loading → result" within one scene.

components.name: NotificationToast
components.description: Notification toast/banner that drops in with an icon, title and message (notification / toast / alert / push / pop-up message). Auto-sizes for mobile; keep title short and message to one concise line so it reads well on a phone. Use to show an alert or app notification.

icon.label: Icon
icon.description: Emoji for the notification (empty = no icon)

showIconBox.label: Icon Box
showIconBox.description: Show the rounded square behind the icon

width.label: Width
width.description: Toast width in px (auto if empty)

components.name: StyleNotificationStack
components.description: Stack of notification cards that slide in from the right with staggered spring animations (notification feed / push notifications / alert stack / message stack). Use for showing multiple notifications or alerts in sequence.

notifications.label: Notifications
notifications.description: Array of {title, body, color, delay} notifications

cardWidth.label: Card Width
cardWidth.description: Card width in px (auto if empty)

slideDistance.label: Slide Distance
slideDistance.description: How far cards slide from (px, auto if empty)

components.name: MessageBubble
components.description: Chat message bubbles with sender/receiver styling appearing one after another (chat / texting / iMessage / WhatsApp / DM conversation). One message or many (semicolon-separated). Use to show a back-and-forth. For a single bubble use TextBubble.

messages.label: Messages
messages.description: Semicolon-separated messages (R: for receiver, S: for sender). One item = single bubble.
messages.default: R:Hey, did you see the new feature?;S:Yeah! It looks amazing.

components.name: TextBubble
components.description: A single speech/thought bubble with a configurable pointer tail and pop entrance (speech bubble / callout / comic balloon / tooltip). Editable colors, font, width (wraps) and corners. Use for one quote or a pointed remark. For a chat thread use MessageBubble.

animateIn.label: Animate In
animateIn.description: Built-in pop entry (off = use layer entry/exit)

components.name: FeatureUnlock
components.description: A padlock that unlocks to reveal a feature or reward (unlock / unlocked / new feature / level up / gated reveal). Use for "feature unlocked" or unlocking gated content.

components.name: FlashSaleTimer
components.description: Urgent sale countdown with HH:MM:SS(:MS) blocks (flash sale / limited offer / deal ends / urgency timer / sale countdown). Use for promos and scarcity. For a neutral countdown use CountdownTimer.

size.label: Size
size.description: Overall size multiplier (shrink if it overflows)

components.name: FloatingBadge
components.description: A badge/sticker that floats with a continuous hover bob, in configurable shapes (floating badge / sticker / seal / award / "NEW" tag). Use for accents like NEW, SALE or a seal of approval.

width.label: Max Width
width.description: Max width before wrapping (px). 0 = no wrap

components.name: ProgressPill
components.description: Progress bar with an animated fill from a start to an end percentage (progress / loading bar / completion / percentage). Types: solid, gradient, striped (animated), segmented (chunks) or circular (ring). Label can sit top/bottom/inside/left/right. The single go-to progress component for bars and rings; for a big numeric ring use PercentageRing.

components.name: PromoCodeBanner
components.description: Promo banner showing a discount and a dashed coupon-code box with a wiggle (promo code / coupon / discount / voucher / deal banner). Atomic: per-panel colors, horizontal or vertical layout, optional discount panel (code-only), editable fonts and shadow. Use for offers and discount codes.

codeLabel.label: Code Label
codeLabel.description: Small text above the code (empty = hide)

showDiscount.label: Show Discount Panel
showDiscount.description: Show the big discount box (off = code only)

fontSize.label: Discount Size
fontSize.description: Discount font size in px (auto if empty)

codeFontSize.label: Code Size
codeFontSize.description: Code font size in px (auto if empty)

cornerRadius.label: Corner Radius
cornerRadius.description: Corner radius in px (auto if empty)

components.name: PodcastGuestCard
components.description: Podcast guest card: avatar, name and role with a pulsing glow (podcast guest / speaker card / featuring / episode guest). Use to introduce a guest or speaker.

components.name: PricingTableReveal
components.description: Three-tier pricing table with a highlighted "Most Popular" middle plan (pricing / plans / tiers / subscription table / compare plans). Use for SaaS or product pricing comparisons.

components.name: ProductCardReveal
components.description: Product card with image area, title and price badge that floats in (product card / shop item / e-commerce / price tag). Use to showcase a product for sale.

components.name: CalendarDatePop
components.description: Calendar that circles a target date (month view) or a target month (year view) (calendar / save the date / mark the date / event day / reminder). Fully recolorable (light or dark). Use to highlight a date or event.

showWeekdays.label: Show Weekdays
showWeekdays.description: Show the M T W… row (month view)

components.name: CodeBlockHighlight
components.description: Code editor/snippet mockup with a highlighted line (code block / snippet / IDE / programming). Optional typing mode writes the code out and the highlight follows the line being typed. Fully recolorable. For a terminal/CLI look use TerminalHacker.

typing.label: Typing
typing.description: Type the code out; highlight follows the current line

highlightLine.label: Highlight Line
highlightLine.description: Line to highlight when not typing (1-indexed)

components.name: MusicPlayerUI
components.description: Music player UI with album art, track info, progress bar and controls (music player / now playing / Spotify-style / song UI). Use for music, podcasts or "now playing" moments.

progress.label: Progress
progress.description: Bar position 0-100 (start point, or fixed if paused)

paused.label: Paused
paused.description: Freeze the bar at Progress (shows play icon)

width.label: Width
width.description: Card width in px (auto if empty)

titleSize.label: Title Size
titleSize.description: Song title size in px (auto if empty)

artistSize.label: Artist Size
artistSize.description: Artist size in px (auto if empty)

components.name: TerminalHacker
components.description: Terminal window with typewriter effect and blinking cursor. Atomic: lines as a list, editable colors and header title.

components.name: TestimonialReview
components.description: Testimonial/review card with an animated rating (stars, circles or hearts), a quote and the author (review / testimonial / rating / 5 stars / customer quote). Editable colors and shape; long text wraps. Use for social proof and reviews.

review.label: Review
review.default: "This tool saved our team 20 hours a week!"

fontSize.label: Font Size
fontSize.description: Review text size px (auto if empty)

components.name: TinderSwipeCard
components.description: Tinder-style card that swipes away (left/right/up/down) with a "MATCH!"/"NOPE" stamp (swipe card / dating app / Tinder / match / yes-no choice). Single card or a stack that swipes in sequence, each in its own direction. Use for swipe/choice moments or matchmaking gags.

cards.label: Card Stack
cards.description: Stack: {name, subtitle, stampText, stampColor, direction}. Overrides single card.

components.name: VersusScreen
components.description: Versus screen: two colored sides with a central "VS" badge and an animated split (versus / vs / face-off / this vs that / battle / comparison). Divider can be straight, diagonal or curved; full screen or a sized box. Use for head-to-head comparisons or matchups.

cover.label: Full Screen
cover.description: Cover whole canvas (off = sized box at x/y)

width.label: Width
width.description: Box width px (when not full screen)

height.label: Height
height.description: Box height px (when not full screen)

components.name: APIRequestFlow
components.description: Animated flow of N boxes connected by arrows: request→response by default, or an arbitrary chain via "steps" (API / request-response / client-server / data flow / HTTP / pipeline). Reveal style: sequence, instant or fade. Use to explain an API or any step-by-step flow.

requestBody.label: Request Body
requestBody.description: JSON body of the API request

responseBody.label: Response Body
responseBody.description: JSON body of the API response

steps.label: Steps
steps.description: Custom chain of boxes: [{label, sublabel, body, color}] (overrides default 2-box mode)

components.name: MaskedReveal
components.description: Reveals text with a directional clip wipe — up/down/left/right (masked reveal / wipe-in / clip reveal / unmask). Long text wraps (not clipped). Has a built-in reveal in and an optional exit (closes at the end). Use to uncover a title or phrase with a clean edge.

exit.label: Exit
exit.description: Close the reveal at the end of the scene

components.name: GeometricShapes
components.description: A single configurable geometric shape centered at x,y, defined by geometry: sides (0=circle/oval, 3=triangle, 4=rectangle, 5+=polygon) or points (star). Use width/height for ovals & rectangles. Great as an accent behind text using zIndex.

points.label: Star Points
points.description: Star points (>=3). If > 0 it overrides sides. 0 = no star

components.name: WaveformVisualizer
components.description: Animated sine waveform with multiple frequency layers and glow. Direction controls travel (right/left/still).

components.name: AudioSpectrumBars
components.description: Equalizer / audio spectrum bars bouncing like a sound spectrum (equalizer / EQ / audio bars / sound visualizer / music bars). Use for music, audio or podcast vibes.

components.name: RippleEffect
components.description: Pulsing rings that expand and fade out from a center point (ripple / radar ping / sonar / water ripple / pulse / sound wave). Use for taps, signals, pings, or a sound-wave look (enable centerDot).

count.label: Count
count.description: Number of simultaneous rings (spread across one cycle)

centerDot.label: Center Dot
centerDot.description: Solid dot at the center (sound-wave look)

components.name: EmojiFloat
components.description: Emoji particles that float upward with a wiggle and fade out (floating emojis / reactions / hearts rising / live reactions). Use for reactions, likes or playful accents.

components.name: SearchEngineTyping
components.description: Search bar that types a query letter by letter, with a ripple when it finishes (search bar / Google search / type-and-search / search query). Use to show someone searching for something.

height.label: Height
height.description: Search bar height (px) — font/icon scale with it

components.name: GitCommitGraph
components.description: Git branch visualization: a trunk with N commits and N feature branches that fork off and merge back. commits and branches drive how many are drawn.

commits.label: Commits
commits.description: Number of commits on the main trunk

branches.label: Branches
branches.description: Number of feature branches (0 = trunk only)

components.name: BreakingNewsAlert
components.description: Breaking-news banner that slams in with a pulse and warning stripes (breaking news / alert / urgent banner / news flash). Use for dramatic announcements. For a scrolling news bar use BreakingNewsTicker.

components.name: BreakingNewsTicker
components.description: News ticker bar with scrolling text and a configurable badge (news ticker / lower bar / crawl / breaking-news strip / chyron ticker). Use for a TV-news scrolling headline. For a centered alert banner use BreakingNewsAlert.

text.label: Text
text.default: LATEST UPDATES: Market hits record highs...

barWidth.label: Bar Width
barWidth.description: Ticker bar width (px). Empty/0 = full canvas width

components.name: AnimatedArrow
components.description: An arrow that draws itself from a start to an end point, optionally curved (arrow / pointer / direction / "this way" / connector arrow). Use to point at, connect, or show direction/flow.

components.name: AnimatedLine
components.description: A line that draws itself from start to end, with optional arrowhead and dashed style (line / connector / underline draw / link / divider). Use to connect elements or draw an emphasis line.

components.name: AnimatedShape
components.description: A simple shape (rect, circle, pill, diamond, hexagon) that animates/moves from a start to an end position (shape / moving shape / motion graphic / animated block). Use as a moving accent or building block. For a static configurable shape use GeometricShapes.
